dev_tax.notes: No dev tax. No ongoing block-reward cut to team or treasury. 100% of transaction fees burned since the Leman upgrade (March 2023). PoLW also burns ALPH when network hashrate exceeds 1 EH/s, internalizing mining costs.

suspected_insider_mining.notes: Mining was open from mainnet launch 2021-11-08. No credibly sourced allegations of pre-launch or insider mining. Genesis premine was openly disclosed and on-chain locked, not covertly mined.

buckets.name: Sales (Seed/Pre-sale/Private)
buckets.notes: Aggregate sold across seed + pre-sale + private-sale rounds per official Alephium tokenomics post. Per-round token amounts and pricing are not disclosed. Vesting language in the official post: 'vesting periods varying from 2 to 4 years' with quarterly unlocks — modeled at 36 months (midpoint) with no separate cliff. Widely cited $0.0525 blended price is a derived estimate ($3.6M / ~68.5M), not an officially published figure; cost_per_token_usd left 'unknown'.

investors.notes: Pre-sale tranche announced Sep 2021 raised $3.6M from ~80 contributors. Six investors named via primary or follow-up disclosures (Alphemy Capital led; Cetacean, Luminescence, IBC disclosed later); 74 remain undisclosed. 76% of contributors put in <$50K; 91% put in <$100K; the majority were Swiss residents. Total raised across all three sales rounds (not just the pre-sale tranche) is not publicly disclosed.

buckets.name: Reserved Future Sales
buckets.notes: Unsold residual of the 80M sales allocation (80M total minus 62,951,077 sold). Per official tokenomics: deployed strategically over time via direct sales, liquidity provisioning, and OTC for long-term project sustainability. No fixed vesting schedule; classified as tier_1 because end-use is profit-seeking sales.

investors.notes: Bucket reserved at genesis; not deployed on a fixed timeline.

buckets.name: Treasury & Team
buckets.vesting_note: Per official tokenomics: 'locked for three years and be vested 10M, 10M, and 10M each year in quarters accordingly' — 2.5M ALPH per quarter for 12 quarters, no separate cliff.

multisig.transparency: On-chain time-locked vesting per official Alephium tokenomics post

buckets.usage: Reward team and support future development of Alephium
buckets.transparency: On-chain vesting (specific contract addresses not published in the tokenomics post itself); third-party unlock tracker available at Tokenomist.

buckets.name: Ecosystem Development
buckets.vesting_note: Per official tokenomics: 'Locked on-chain for 4 years and vested quarterly' — modeled as 16 quarters of 1.875M each, no separate cliff. Vesting completes Nov 2025.
buckets.usage: Grants, partnerships, community initiatives, ecosystem incentives
buckets.transparency: On-chain vesting; third-party unlock tracker at Tokenomist.

vesting_waterfall.source: TGE — all premine locked (Sales, Treasury, Ecosystem)
First quarterly unlock — Sales (5.25M) + Treasury (2.5M) + Ecosystem (1.875M)
Ecosystem 100% complete (Nov 2025) — scheduled vesting ends; 17.05M Reserved Future Sales remains undeployed

warnings: Private sale raised $3.6M from ~80 contributors but only 6 institutional investors have been publicly named (Alphemy Capital lead; White Paper Capital, Archery Blockchain at close; Cetacean Capital, Luminescence Capital, International Blockchain Consulting via later disclosures). The remaining 74 contributors are not individually disclosed.

Official tokenomics post describes premine tokens as 'subject to on-chain lock' with vesting but does not publish the specific vesting contract addresses for treasury, team, or ecosystem allocations within the post itself.

July 15 2025 Danube upgrade removed the original 1B ALPH hard cap and replaced it with perpetual tail emission, materially changing the supply contract that was in place at genesis. Original emission curve for the first ~81 years is preserved, but ALPH is now an uncapped-supply asset.
suspicious_timeline: 2025-07-15: Danube upgrade activated, removing the 1B hard cap and introducing tail emission after ~year 81.

transparency_notes: Premine of 140M ALPH (14% of original 1B cap) disclosed in official tokenomics post: 80M Sales (62.95M sold + 17.05M reserved, 2-4yr quarterly vest), 30M Treasury & Team (3yr quarterly), 30M Community & Ecosystem (4yr quarterly).
Only ~6 of ~80 pre-sale contributors are publicly disclosed; the official post and later announcements name lead investors only. Distribution stated as 76% <$50K and 91% <$100K.
Cetacean Capital was disclosed as an investor in April 2022 via a separate partnership announcement, after the original private sale.
Full chain history is publicly browsable on explorer.alephium.org from genesis onward; no known data gaps.

Third-party unlock tracker (Tokenomist) provides public visibility into ALPH bucket-level vesting; specific on-chain vesting contract addresses are not published in the official tokenomics post itself.
Exactly 62,951,077 ALPH of the 80M sales allocation sold across the three rounds; the remaining 17,048,943 sits in a Reserved Future Sales bucket disclosed in the official tokenomics post.
Danube upgrade (2025-07-15) hard-cap removal and tail-emission introduction were documented in the official blog post, FAQ, and protocol docs prior to activation; not a covert change.
